meta.desc: Appointments, staff, clients and revenue in one elegant PWA. Three plans: Studio, Signature, Coach. GDPR Ready, PWA, human support.
meta.title: HŪBIA — App and AI for barbers, salons and professional studios

hero.title: The system that simplifies your venue. And grows with you.
hero.subtitle: Appointments, staff, clients and revenue in one elegant, fast PWA. No compromises.
hero.statRow: 96 bookings this week  ·  +23% returning clients  ·  0 commission

forWho.title: For those who work with people, not chaos.
forWho.subtitle: Your venue. Your brand. Zero confusion.
forWho.card1Desc: Barbers, hair salons, hairdressers. Appointments, staff and clients in one system.
forWho.card2Desc: Beauty centres and aesthetic studios. More services, more people: one system that keeps everything in order.
forWho.card3Desc: Appointments, team availability and patient flow in one reliable operating system.
forWho.card4Desc: Grooming and pet care. Simple bookings for you and your four-legged clients.
forWho.microText: For businesses with more complex flows we build custom solutions.
forWho.customBoxText: Have a business with different or more complex flows?

benefits.title: What it takes off your mind
benefits.subtitle: Less stress. More control.
benefits.b1Title: Appointments that slot in by themselves
benefits.b1Desc: Clear slots, easy changes. No double bookings, no gaps in the agenda.
benefits.b2Desc: Shared calendar, clear services and hours. Everyone knows what to do and when.
benefits.b3Desc: Automatic reminders, fewer no-shows. Clients show up and the agenda stays credible.
benefits.b4Desc: One place for appointments, revenue and data. Decisions based on numbers, not hearsay.

howItWorks.title: A clear system, no surprises.
howItWorks.subtitle: Guided setup, transparent fee. No surprises.
howItWorks.step1Desc: We configure together services, hours and branding. Your business in the app, with your logo and colours.
howItWorks.step2Desc: One fixed cost per month. Infrastructure, updates and support included. No hidden costs.
howItWorks.step3Desc: More staff, more services, more clients: the system adapts. Without changing tools.
howItWorks.setupNote: Setup cost can be spread over 6 or 12 months.
howItWorks.step4Desc: More staff, more services, more locations. The system adapts. Your data stays yours. Always.

plansHome.title: Plans
plansHome.subtitle: Choose the plan that matches your operations: Beauty, medical practices and pet grooming.
plansHome.studioForWho: Barber, hairdresser, beauty centre with one venue. For those who want order without complication.
plansHome.signatureForWho: Premium operating layer: more staff and services, recurring appointments, advanced branding.
plansHome.coachForWho: Signature plus analytics and Coach AI. For venues that want intelligence on top of control.

plansHome.customForWho: Food, multi-site, complex logic. Personalized quote.

coachFeatures: Coach AI — active after 60 days of real usage
Alerts on clients who might stop coming
plansHome.coachNote: * Coach AI is included only on the Coach plan. It activates after 60 days of real data. Your data never leaves the system.
plansHome.compareAppWhiteLabel: Client app with your logo and name

projectsCustom.title: Custom projects
projectsCustom.text: Custom projects for multi-site businesses or advanced operational workflows. Quote after consultation.

notAnyApp.title: It's not just any app
notAnyApp.subtitle: We don't sell you customers. We give you the tool to never lose them.
positioning: HUBIA is not a marketplace. Clients are yours, data is yours.
It's not a generic app. It's built for those who manage appointments and people, not for those who sell "a bit of everything".
It's not for everyone. It's for those who take their venue seriously.

ctaFinal.title: Let's talk
ctaFinal.subtitle: No commitment, no aggressive sales calls.

problem.title: Running a venue in 2026 shouldn't be this chaotic.
problem.p1: Bookings on WhatsApp, paper diaries, staff who don't know what's on tomorrow. Clients who don't come back because no one followed up. Revenue you can't trace.
problem.p2: It's not your fault. It's the tools you've been using. Generic tools built for any business — and perfect for none.
problem.p3: HŪBIA is built for one thing only: venues like yours.

threeLevels.title: One system. Three layers.
threeLevels.subtitle: Each part does its job. Together they do everything.
threeLevels.card1Body: Your clients download Hubia App once. They add your venue by scanning a QR. They book, see loyalty points, get native iOS and Android push notifications. All with your logo, your name, your colours. Zero commission. The clients are yours.
threeLevels.card2Body: Your team works on a professional dashboard, desktop and mobile, in real time. Live bookings, clients, absences, services. Analytics on revenue, occupancy and staff performance. Every metric you need, always up to date.
threeLevels.card3Title: AI that learns from your venue
threeLevels.card3Body: On the Coach plan, after 60 days of use, Coach AI activates. It forecasts revenue for the next 14 days, highlights clients who might stop coming, and suggests actions to fill empty slots. Runs on your data only. No external APIs. No data sharing.
threeLevels.coachBadge: ★ Coach plan · Coach AI activates after 60 days of real data

hubApp.label: HUBIA APP
hubApp.body: Clients don't want a different app for every place they go. Hubia App is the native iOS and Android app that acts as a personal hub. Scan a QR, add the venue, and you're in — with your account, your bookings, your loyalty points. One login. All venues. One aggregated calendar. Native push notifications for every appointment.
features: Add a venue by scanning the QR at the entrance
Single login — no separate account per venue
Upcoming appointments from all venues in one screen
Native iOS and Android push notifications, zero setup
hubApp.note: Each venue keeps its branded app. Hubia App integrates it so the client only sees your brand.

soluzioniDedicate.label: DEDICATED SOLUTIONS
soluzioniDedicate.body: Some businesses have unique workflows. Multi-site with different logic. Non-standard verticals. Integrations with existing systems. Apps with fully custom architecture and design. We don't adapt the product to your business. We build the product for your business.
soluzioniDedicate.card1Desc: An operating system designed exactly for your model. Workflows, roles, logic — built from scratch for your use case.
soluzioniDedicate.card2Desc: A native iOS and Android app with your brand, architecture and UX designed for your specific business.
soluzioniDedicate.card3Desc: Already have a system? We integrate or migrate your data with no downtime.
soluzioniDedicate.closingBox: Each dedicated solution is a project on its own. Costs vary by complexity and scope. The first step is understanding what you really need.

differenziatori.title: Three things you won't find elsewhere.
differenziatori.block1Body: They book from an app with your name. Not from a shared marketplace. No middleman. No commission. Your clients' data belongs to you — and only you.
differenziatori.block2Body: Coach AI doesn't use external APIs. It doesn't send your data to any third party. It learns from your venue, only your venue. The more you use it, the more accurate it gets.
differenziatori.block3Body: From the app icon to button colours. Your clients don't know you use HŪBIA. They just know you have a professional app that works better than anything they've seen.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: We don't sell you customers. We give you the tool to never lose them. HŪBIA is the management system for local businesses that want to organise bookings, clients and staff professionally. Three plans: Studio, Signature, Coach.

pwaBlock.title: PWA only, no store apps
pwaBlock.body: The app installs on smartphone (iOS and Android) with your logo and colours. No store required: clients and staff add it from the web page. One piece of software, updates included.

pricing.footer: One-time setup + monthly fee. Setup can be spread over 6 or 12 months at no extra cost.
pricing.setupSectionBody: The setup is one-time and includes: initial system configuration, visual customisation (logo and colours for your business), setup of services and staff, testing and go-live. You can spread it over 6 or 12 months at no extra cost. No hidden fees.
pricing.setupIncludes: Initial configuration, visual customisation, services and staff setup, testing and go-live. One-time, spread over 6 or 12 months.
pricing.setupMaxNote: Guided configuration and direct support until go-live.

faq.q1: Can I change plan (Studio, Signature, Coach)?
faq.a1: Yes, upgrade or change is possible at any time. The change applies from the next billing cycle.
faq.q2: What happens if I choose Studio?
faq.a2: You get all the essentials: bookings, calendar, staff, clients, notifications. Recurring appointments and advanced branding are on Signature; Analytics and Coach AI are on Coach only.
faq.q3: Are advanced features removed or locked?
faq.a3: Recurring and advanced branding are on Signature. Analytics and Coach AI are only on the Coach plan. With Studio they are not active; when you move plan you enable them without changing system.
faq.q4: Do I need to install an app from the store?
faq.a4: No. HŪBIA works as a modern web app (PWA): clients and staff can add it to their phone home screen from the browser, without using the stores. Same experience as an app, no store install.
faq.a5: Initial configuration, visual customisation (logo and colours), services and staff setup, testing and go-live. It is one-time and can be spread over 6 or 12 months.
faq.a6: One-time setup at activation (spread over 6 or 12 months) and monthly fee. No long-term commitment.

verticalPricing.title: Prices by plan
verticalPricing.note: Beauty, medical practices and pet grooming. Setup can be spread over 6 or 12 months.

pricing.multiSiteNote: Multi-site (2-5 locations): same price per site. Setup €900 first site, €400 additional sites. Over 5 sites: custom quote.
pricing.metaDescription: Three plans: Studio (€900 setup + €89/mo), Signature (€1,400 setup + €120/mo), Coach (€1,400 setup + €149/mo). Setup spread over 6 or 12 months. Coach AI included with Coach plan only.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: HŪBIA privacy policy. How we collect, use and protect your data.
privacy.p1Body: HŪBIA ("we", "our", "us") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use, store and protect your information when you use our service. It applies to all users of our services: visitors to our website, users of the Hubia customer app (for booking at partner venues), and business or shop accounts.
privacy.p2Intro: We collect the following types of personal data:
privacy.p2Li1: Contact data: name, email address, phone number
privacy.p2Li2: Business data: business name, type of business, billing information
privacy.p2Li3: Usage data: how you use our service, access logs, preferences
privacy.p2Li4: Technical data: IP address, browser type, operating system, device information
privacy.p3Intro: We use your personal data to:
privacy.p3Li2: Process your requests and manage your account
privacy.p3Li3: Communicate with you about the service, updates and support
privacy.p3Li4: Comply with legal and regulatory obligations
privacy.p4Intro: We process your personal data on the basis of:
privacy.p4Li1: Contract performance: to provide the requested service
privacy.p4Li2: Consent: when you have given explicit consent
privacy.p4Li3: Legitimate interest: to improve the service and ensure security
privacy.p4Li4: Legal obligation: to comply with legal requirements
privacy.p5Intro: We do not sell your personal data. We may share your data only with:
privacy.p5Li1: Service providers: hosting, payment, email (only to provide the service)
privacy.p5Li2: Legal authorities: when required by law or to protect our rights
privacy.p5Li3: Business partners: only with your explicit consent
privacy.p6Body: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to provide the service and comply with legal obligations. When you delete your account, data is removed within 30 days, except where legal retention applies.
privacy.p7Li4: Object to the processing of your data
privacy.p7Li7: Lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority (e.g. Data Protection Authority)
privacy.p8Body: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data, including encryption, limited access, regular backups and ongoing monitoring.
privacy.p9Body: Your data is primarily hosted in the European Union. Any transfer outside the EU takes place only with appropriate safeguards under the GDPR.
privacy.p10Body: We may update this policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes by email or via a notice in the service.
privacy.p11Body: To exercise your rights or for privacy-related questions, contact us at:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: Terms and conditions for using the HŪBIA service.
terms.s1Body: By accessing and using the HŪBIA service ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not accept these Terms, do not use the Service.
terms.s2Body: HŪBIA is a software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform that provides tools for managing bookings, clients, staff and operations for local businesses (beauty, medical practices, pet grooming and other verticals). The Service includes access to a web app and PWA, staff area and availability management, and support features.
terms.s3Intro: To use the Service, you must:
terms.s3Li1: Be of legal age or have parental/guardian consent
terms.s3Li2: Provide accurate and complete information when registering
terms.s3Li3: Keep your account and password secure
terms.s3Li4: Be responsible for all activity under your account
terms.s3Li5: Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use
terms.s4Li1: Setup fee: One-time payment when activating the service
terms.s4Li2: Monthly fee: Billed in advance each month
terms.s4Li3: Auto-renewal: The service renews automatically unless cancelled
terms.s4Li4: Refunds: The setup fee is non-refundable. The monthly fee may be refunded proportionally for the unused period only in case of early cancellation
terms.s4Li5: Price changes: We will notify you at least 30 days in advance of any price changes
terms.s5Li1: Use the Service for illegal or unauthorized purposes
terms.s5Li3: Interfere with the operation of the Service
terms.s5Li4: Access systems or data without authorization
terms.s5Li5: Transmit viruses, malware or harmful code
terms.s5Li6: Use the Service for spam or unauthorized communications
terms.s5Li7: Copy, modify or distribute the software without authorization
terms.s6Body: All intellectual property rights in the Service, including but not limited to software, design, logos, trademarks and content, are owned by HŪBIA or its licensors. You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Service in accordance with these Terms.
terms.s7Body: We respect your privacy and process your data in accordance with our Privacy Policy. You retain ownership of your data and may export it at any time. We do not use your data for purposes other than those necessary to provide the Service.
terms.s8Body: We strive to keep the Service available but do not guarantee uninterrupted availability. The Service may be temporarily unavailable for maintenance, updates or force majeure. Support levels for Studio, Signature and Coach plans are described on the Pricing page.
terms.s9Intro: You may cancel the Service at any time:
terms.s9Li1: By you: Contact us at least 7 days before the end of the billing period
terms.s9Li2: By us: We may suspend or terminate your account in case of breach of these Terms, with notice when possible
terms.s9Li3: Effects of cancellation: You will lose access to the Service and data. We will provide a 30-day grace period to export your data
terms.s10Body: The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for data loss, business interruption or indirect damages arising from use of the Service. Our total liability is limited to the amount you paid in the last 12 months.
terms.s11Body: We may modify these Terms from time to time. Material changes will be notified by email or via in-service notice. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.
terms.s12Body: These Terms are governed by the laws of Italy. Any dispute shall be resolved by the competent courts in Italy.
terms.s13Body: For questions about these Terms, contact us at:
